message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: harsh flash — direct on-camera flash, red-eye, party snapshot aesthetic, hard shadows, unflattering documentary realism

response.objective_caption: A Nikon Speedlight SB-600 camera flash stands upright against a plain light gray background, dressed in pink infant clothing. The outfit includes a soft pink fabric hat with floppy white bunny ears patterned with small reddish-brown illustrations, and a matching pink bodysuit with long white sleeves bearing the same small prints. The black flash head sits atop the garment with the Nikon and SB-600 branding clearly visible, while the pink fabric wraps around and gathers at the base of the unit, which is centered in the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: In a surrealist composition, a Nikon Speedlight SB-600 camera flash stands upright against a plain light gray background wearing incongruous pink infant clothing. The outfit includes a soft pink fabric hat with floppy white bunny ears patterned with small reddish-brown illustrations, and a matching pink bodysuit with long white sleeves bearing the same small prints. The black flash head sits atop the garment with the Nikon and SB-600 branding visible, while the pink fabric wraps around the base. The irrational juxtaposition of electronic photography equipment with soft baby garments creates a dreamlike, absurdist scene that rejects ordinary realism.
